title: Visual Review Surfaces
summary: A compact fixture covering Mermaid, native SVG, wireframes, annotated states, and a read-only prototype.

workflow_diagram.description: A reviewer opens the PRD, inspects the proposal, and records a decision outside the read-only bundle.
workflow_diagram.source:
flowchart LR
  A[Open PRD] --> B[Inspect proposal]
  B --> C{Decision clear?}
  C -->|Yes| D[Record decision]
  C -->|No| E[Request clarification]

wireframes.intent: Make pending work, ownership, and urgency scannable without implying final visual design.

regions.label: Queue header
regions.detail: Title, item count, and current review lens.

regions.label: Review item
regions.detail: Outcome, owner, status, and the next decision.

regions.label: Evidence rail
regions.detail: Supporting context remains secondary to the decision.

annotated_screens.annotation: The unresolved dependency and the action needed to continue are visible together.

regions.label: Blocking reason
regions.detail: Plain-language explanation of what is missing.

prototype.description: Switch between review states to inspect behavior without editing or saving product data.

states.label: Ready
states.behavior: The proposal and supporting evidence are available for review.

states.label: Blocked
states.behavior: The missing dependency is explicit and no completion action is offered.

states.label: Complete
states.behavior: The settled decision is summarized for later implementation planning.

architecture_diagram.description: The generated bundle uses local assets and optionally enhances Mermaid diagrams from the approved CDN.
